description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a matte white exterior and a simple, modern label design. The front features the word 'drink' in bold, dark blue lowercase letters, centered above a wide light blue band that wraps around the lower portion of the can. The back displays a nutrition facts panel, a barcode, recycling symbol, and a list of ingredients, all printed in black. The can has a typical pull tab on the top, made of the same metallic material as the body. The surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible condensation or textural embellishments. The overall design is minimalistic, with a focus on clean lines and clear, legible text.
description: A matte white aluminum beer can with a bold 'drink' label, blue accent band, and minimalistic black text details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the word 'drink' in bold blue letters and a wide blue band at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view with partial label text visible and the nutrition facts panel starting to come into view.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the nutrition facts, barcode, recycling symbol, and ingredients list.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the barcode, recycling symbol, and a partial view of the front label.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a clean, minimalistic design with bold, sans-serif typography and a wide light blue band near the base. The overall style is modern and uncluttered, using a limited color palette and straightforward layout.
